findings.geneticAnalysis: A derived CT call is available for MTHFR C677T. This is CDC-framed folate-processing context only and is not a detoxification-capacity result, toxin-sensitivity result, diagnosis, diet recommendation, supplement recommendation, medication result, or treatment result.
findings.sourceLabel: CDC MTHFR Gene Variant and Folic Acid Facts
findings.plainEnglishMeaning: CDC framing is used here: common MTHFR variants can be discussed as folate-processing context, but they do not by themselves support detox, diet, or supplement conclusions.

findings.geneticAnalysis: A derived AC call is available for MTHFR A1298C. This marker is reported as local context only and does not infer detoxification capacity, toxin sensitivity, methylation capacity, homocysteine, lab status, diet needs, supplement needs, medication response, or treatment needs.
findings.sourceLabel: CDC MTHFR Gene Variant and Folic Acid Facts
findings.plainEnglishMeaning: This row keeps the local genotype visible while leaving detoxification, toxin sensitivity, lab, diet, supplement, and treatment interpretations unavailable without validated evidence.

folateContext.plainEnglishMeaning: The available MTHFR calls can be described as folate-processing context, not as a detox-pathway measurement.
folateContext.folicAcidSafetyNote: Under the CDC framing used by this package, common MTHFR variants are not a reason to avoid folic acid.

references.title: CDC MTHFR Gene Variant and Folic Acid Facts

uncertainty: Detoxification and toxin-sensitivity claims require validated models and broader biological, exposure, medical, and environmental context.
MTHFR markers alone should not be used to guide diet, supplements, medications, testing, or treatment.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The package is educational and does not report detoxification capacity, toxin sensitivity, methylation capacity, diagnosis, diet instructions, supplement instructions, medication response, or treatment guidance.
